german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead, But Technical Roles Trail Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A notable gap exists between Core and Technical PM positions, indicating potential constraints in talent accessibility.

seniority.title: Mid-level Roles Are Predominant in Workforce
seniority.subtitle: With 40% of positions held by mid-level professionals, seniority is mixed.

work_mode.title: Fragmented Work Modes Indicate Uncertain Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of the workforce remains unclassified, highlighting mixed expectations for remote and on-site arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream
ai.subtitle: Nearly half of roles now prioritize AI responsibilities and skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Across Categories
industry.subtitle: No single category dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
